title: [codereview pass 3/3] Rust and C signed_data() do not include current_channel for CCP-9 announce binding
description: project-LICHEN-3i18: Rust Announce::write_signed_data and C build_signed_data omit the channel byte unlike Python. This allows potential tampering with announced RX channel in CCP-9 rendezvous. Update both to include after seq_num in signed data, adjust parse/wire. P1 correctness/security. Files: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:122, lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/announce.c:103. Must fix before closing parent.
